domain: Bulgarian gadulka pear-shaped bowed string instrument (Balkan, 19th c. onward): 3 main melody-strings + 8 sympathetic resonance-strings underneath; sympathetic strings never bowed (passively vibrate through resonance with melody strings); bourdon (drone) tuning on lowest melody-string; arch-bow continuous trajectory (no plucking); scordatura (variable tuning) for different folk traditions.
specific_mechanism: GADULKA-3-MELODY-8-SYMPATHETIC-NULL-SPACE-BOURDON-ARCH-BOW-CONTINUOUS-SCORDATURA-RESET: LLM null-space-traversal mechanism with (1) 3-melody-rank subspace + 8-null-space-resonance dimensions R_split: 3-dim active-rank for task-specific learning + 8-dim null-space passive resonance; (2) bourdon-anchored common-mode B_drone: lowest-rank component shared frozen anchor; (3) sympathetic-resonance passive S_res: 8-dim never directly updated, only induced resonance from 3-melody dims; (4) arch-bow continuous trajectory G_continuous: bow-pressure gradient as continuous-time curve smooth update; (5) scordatura initial-tuning orthogonality reset I_orth: per-domain re-tuning of 11-string alignment vectors. Differs from R503 ROMANIAN-DOINA, R516 SLOVAK-FUJARA, R528 NEY, R541 NGURU, R553 TUVAN-KHOOMEI, R566 KHOISAN by 3+8 explicit rank/null split + bourdon-anchored common-mode + sympathetic passive S_res + arch-bow continuous G + scordatura I_orth.
llm_application: GADULKA-3-MELODY-8-SYMPATHETIC-NULL-SPACE-BOURDON-ARCH-BOW-CONTINUOUS-SCORDATURA-RESET LLM mechanism + R_split 3+8 rank-null + B_drone bourdon anchor + S_res sympathetic passive + G_continuous arch-bow + I_orth scordatura reset. Differs from R503. R516. R528. R541. R553. R566 (closest — 5-place orthogonal contrast + ingressive airstream channel + dual-mechanism phonology + huge inventory specialization + Bantu null-projection). Differs from LoRA + LoRA-Null + CLoRA + SpectralSphere + LatentSpace by 3+8 explicit rank/null split + bourdon-anchored common-mode + sympathetic passive S_res + arch-bow continuous G + scordatura I_orth. Differs by 3+8-RANK-NULL + BOURDON ANCHOR + SYMPATHETIC PASSIVE + ARCH-BOW CONTINUOUS + SCORDATURA RESET.
novelty_claim: LoRA + LoRA-Null + CLoRA + SpectralSphere + LatentSpace cover low-rank + null-space + spectral-control paradigm. GADULKA adds (a) 3+8 rank-null split + (b) bourdon anchor + (c) sympathetic passive + (d) arch-bow continuous + (e) scordatura reset. Recombination — borderline. K_sub_mechanisms=5.
